mentions.text:
@taleino93 I do like Rare Earth given geopolitical risk with China. Trump is also deploying $5B to accelerating mining. 

I was thinking $REMX or $MP calls, but $UURAF looks promising too, I'll look into it more. Main downside I see is that it's CAD. 

Not much of a fan of $NAKA or holding companies under NAV. Grayscale was under NAV for the longest time.  

Yeah I knew about $BITF before. I just liked $NBIS more but there's tons of other miners pivoting to AI out there.  THanks for the recs
@estcstfreedom $REMX is a good critical materials ETF. I haven’t looked at the portfolio weightings of the names above but I’m sure it’s great exposures to the sector
